meta.title: Services
meta.description: Explore our professional maintenance and repair services for your motorcycle.

testimonialsSection.title: Certifications & Reviews
testimonialsSection.subTitle: What Our Customers Say About Us
testimonialsSection.aseDesc: Certification from the National Institute for Automotive Service Excellence.
testimonialsSection.isoDesc: Complies with international quality management standards.
testimonialsSection.nguyenComment: Excellent service! I always trust this center for my vehicle maintenance.
testimonialsSection.tranComment: Very professional attitude and fast repair time.

serviceReviewSection.title: Customer Reviews
serviceReviewSection.nguyenContent: Very good service, enthusiastic and professional staff, my vehicle runs smoother after maintenance.
serviceReviewSection.tranContent: Reasonable price, although waiting time was a bit long. Maintenance service was quite good.
serviceReviewSection.leContent: Very satisfied with the oil change and brake inspection. I will return next time.

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faqSection.howOften: How often should I service my motorbike?
faqSection.howOftenAnswer: Regular servicing is recommended every 3,000 - 5,000 km or as suggested by the manufacturer. However, you should also look out for unusual noises, decreased brake performance, or worn tires.
faqSection.needBooking: Do I need to make a booking in advance?
faqSection.needBookingAnswer: Although you can walk in, we recommend booking in advance via phone or website to save time and ensure staff availability.
faqSection.warranty: Is there a warranty after repair?
faqSection.warrantyAnswer: We offer warranties for repairs and parts replacement depending on the service and parts used. Detailed warranty information will be provided during your visit.

priceTableSection.title: Service Price Table
priceTableSection.oilNote: Depends on oil type and engine size
priceTableSection.fullNote: Includes cleaning, bolt tightening, and system check
priceTableSection.brakeNote: Depends on pad type and vehicle model
priceTableSection.electricalNote: Depends on fault level & replacement parts

serviceHeroSection.title: Professional Motorcycle Maintenance & Repair Service

serviceListSection.title: Popular Services
serviceListSection.oilChangeDesc: Keeps engine running smoothly and prolongs lifespan.
serviceListSection.fullMaintenanceDesc: Check all systems to detect issues early and ensure safety.
serviceListSection.sparkAirDesc: Strong ignition and better fuel efficiency.
serviceListSection.brakeRepairDesc: Stay safe with a fully functional brake system.
serviceListSection.electricalDesc: Fix electrical issues and replace faulty parts quickly.

serviceProcressSection.title: Professional Maintenance Process
serviceProcressSection.step1Desc: Quick booking via website or hotline.
serviceProcressSection.step2Desc: Staff receives the bike and checks current condition.
serviceProcressSection.step4Desc: Technicians proceed with repairs using modern equipment.
serviceProcressSection.step5Desc: Final check, clean delivery and full warranty.
